# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building binaries and configurations..."
    - mkdir build
    - echo "Binary file" > build/binary
    - echo "Config file" > build/config
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy_job_linux:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying on Linux..."
    - cp build/binary /path/to/destination/binary
    - cp build/config /path/to/destination/config
  dependencies:
    - build_job

deploy_job_windows:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying on Windows..."
    - copy build\binary C:\path\to\destination\binary
    - copy build\config C:\path\to\destination\config
  dependencies:
    - build_job
